scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');fs.copyFileSync('src/db/schema.sql','dist/db/schema.sql');const src='src/db/migrations',dst='dist/db/migrations';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f));}const promptSrc='src/prompts',promptDst='dist/prompts';if(fs.existsSync(promptSrc)){fs.mkdirSync(promptDst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(promptSrc))fs.copyFileSync(p.join(promptSrc,f),p.join(promptDst,f));}"
